message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing the balance on account ****8824. Before any account-specific next steps can be discussed, identity verification is required. Please provide the minimum partial identifier on file for verification.
I can verify, but keep it minimal—what exact partial identifier do you need so we can get to the payoff terms and deadline?
The minimum partial identifier required for verification is the last 4 digits of the phone number on file.
Understood.
Please provide the last 4 digits of the phone number on file to complete verification.
I’m ready to verify, but I need to know what happens next—once I give the last 4, what exact payoff amount and payment deadline can you offer?

I cannot provide account-specific payoff terms or deadlines before verification. After verification, I can continue the required assessment. Please provide the last 4 digits of the phone number on file.
Before I share that, I need a concrete next step—if I verify now, will you give me a firm payoff amount and payment deadline today?

I cannot confirm a firm payoff amount or payment deadline before verification. If you verify, the account can be reviewed for available next steps under policy. Please provide the last 4 digits of the phone number on file.
If you can’t confirm there’ll be a firm payoff quote and deadline today after verification, then I’m not sharing more information yet.

I cannot confirm that in this chat before verification. If you do not want to provide the last 4 digits now, I will note that you want contact only if a concrete approved option is available. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Next stage should not repeat disclosures or re-ask broader questions; if phone contact occurs, continue naturally from the borrower\u2019s condition and discuss only approved next steps consistent with policy after any required verification."}

Understood. I’ve noted a limited contact preference: discuss this only if a concrete approved option is available with a specific amount and deadline. No live payoff quote can be finalized in chat without the required verification, so I won’t continue negotiation here.
